positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a group of diverse flora, including bioluminescent fern fronds, geometric succulents, and exotic flowering vines. The style is high-contrast modern vector illustration with subtle gradients and limited, deep jewel-toned colors (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple, and metallic gold highlights). The composition is symmetrical and radial, featuring a strong central grouping. Excellent clean silhouette, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or single central print. Solid white background for maximum contrast.
